lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕੁਲ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਪਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: akul niranjan purakh agam apaareeai |
lines.english: He is without relatives, immaculate, all-powerful, unapproachable and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੁ ਨਿਹਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sacho sachaa sach sach nihaareeai |
lines.english: Truly, the True Lord is seen to be the Truest of the True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ਸਗਲੇ ਦੂਖ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis simarat sukh hoe sagale dookh jaeh |2|
lines.english: Remembering Him in meditation, happiness comes, and all sorrows and pains simply vanish. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਤੁ ਸੂਤਿ ਪਰੋਇ ਜੋਤਿ ਸੰਜਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: eikat soot paroe jot sanjaareeai |
lines.english: He has strung all on only one thread; He has infused His Light in them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਤੇਰੀ ਧਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: koorr na jaapai kichh teree dhaareeai |
lines.english: Nothing established by You appears to be false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਸੈ ਦੇ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਜੇਤ ਉਪਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sabhasai de daataar jet upaareeai |
lines.english: The Great Giver gives sustenance to all those He has created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਭਵਜਲ ਮੰਝਿ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਤਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: hukame bhavajal manjh hukame taareeai |
lines.english: By His Will, some drown in the terrifying world-ocean, and by His Will, some are carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਸੋਇ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਗੁ ਮਥਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: prabh jeeo tudh dhiaae soe jis bhaag mathaareeai |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, he alone meditates on You, upon whose forehead such blessed destiny is inscribed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੂੰ ਤੁਸਹਿ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨ ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਵਸਹਿ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa toon tuseh miharavaan achint vaseh man maeh |
lines.english: When You are pleased, O Merciful Lord, you automatically come to dwell within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਲਖੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਹਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: teree gat mit lakhee na jaae hau tudh balihaareeai |1|
lines.english: Your condition and state cannot be known; I am a sacrifice to You. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੂੰ ਤੁਸਹਿ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨ ਤਾ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa toon tuseh miharavaan taa gur kaa mantru kamaeh |
lines.english: When You are pleased, O Merciful Lord, I act according to the Guru's Instructions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੂੰ ਤੁਸਹਿ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa toon tuseh miharavaan nau nidh ghar meh paeh |
lines.english: When You are pleased, O Merciful Lord, I find the nine treasures within the home of my own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੂੰ ਤੁਸਹਿ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨ ਤਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaa toon tuseh miharavaan taa naanak sach samaeh |1|
lines.english: When You are pleased, O Merciful Lord, then Nanak is absorbed in the True One. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਣੁ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਰਹੀਆ ਲਜ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sache naam vin kisai na raheea laj |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Name, no one's honor is safe. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਤੀ ਬੈਹਨੑਿ ਬੈਹਣੇ ਮੁਚੁ ਵਜਾਇਨਿ ਵਜ ॥
lines.translit: kitee baihana baihane much vajaaein vaj |
lines.english: Many sit on thrones, to the sounds of musical instruments.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਧਿਆਇਨੑਿ ਬੇਦ ਕਤੇਬਾ ਸਣੁ ਖੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: tudh dhiaaeina bed katebaa san kharre |
lines.english: The followers of the Vedas, the Bible and the Koran, standing at Your Door, meditate on You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਧਿਆਇਨੑਿ ਇੰਦ੍ਰ ਇੰਦ੍ਰਾਸਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: brahame tudh dhiaaeina indr indraasanaa |
lines.english: Brahma meditates on You, as does Indra on his throne.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਣਤੀ ਗਣੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਤੇਰੈ ਦਰਿ ਪੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: ganatee ganee na jaae terai dar parre |
lines.english: Uncounted are those who fall at Your Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਤਿ ਪੋਤਿ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਮਉਲੀਏ ॥
lines.translit: ot pot nirankaar ghatt ghatt maulee |
lines.english: Through and through, the Formless Lord is woven into each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਕਰ ਬਿਸਨ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਭਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sankar bisan avataar har jas mukh bhanaa |
lines.english: Shiva and Vishnu, and their incarnations, chant the Lord's Praise with their mouths,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਰ ਪਿਕਾਬਰ ਸੇਖ ਮਸਾਇਕ ਅਉਲੀਏ ॥
lines.translit: peer pikaabar sekh masaaeik aaulee |
lines.english: as do the Pirs, the spiritual teachers, the prophets and the Shaykhs, the silent sages and the seers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਹੁ ਕਰੇ ਵਿਣਾਸੁ ਧਰਮੇ ਤਗੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: koorrahu kare vinaas dharame tageeai |
lines.english: One is destroyed through falsehood; through righteousness, one prospers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਤਿਤੁ ਤਿਤੁ ਲਗੀਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jit jit laaeihi aap tith tit lageeai |2|
lines.english: Whatever the Lord links him to, to that he is linked. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਗਿਆਈਁ ਆਲਕੁ ਕਰੇ ਬੁਰਿਆਈਁ ਹੋਇ ਸੇਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: changiaaee aalak kare buriaaee hoe ser |
lines.english: He is reluctant to do good, but eager to practice evil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਜੁ ਕਲਿ ਆਵਸੀ ਗਾਫਲ ਫਾਹੀ ਪੇਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak aj kal aavasee gaafal faahee per |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, today or tomorrow, the feet of the careless fool shall fall into the trap. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੈ ਸਹਿ ਢਕਿਆ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਚਾ ਮਿਤੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak tai seh dtakiaa man meh sachaa mit |2|
lines.english: Nanak: You, O Lord, conceal my short-comings and dwell within my mind; You are my true friend. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਤੀਆ ਕੁਢੰਗ ਗੁਝਾ ਥੀਐ ਨ ਹਿਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: kiteea kudtang gujhaa theeai na hit |
lines.english: No matter how evil my ways are, still, Your Love for me is not concealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਮਾਗਉ ਤੁਝੈ ਦਇਆਲ ਕਰਿ ਦਾਸਾ ਗੋਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau maagau tujhai deaal kar daasaa goliaa |
lines.english: I beg of You, O Merciful Lord: please, make me the slave of Your slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ਰਾਜੁ ਜੀਵਾ ਬੋਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: nau nidh paaee raaj jeevaa boliaa |
lines.english: I obtain the nine treasures and royalty; chanting Your Name, I live.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ਸ੍ਰਵਣੀ ਜਸੁ ਸੁਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: tin kai sang nihaal sravanee jas sunaa |
lines.english: In their company, I am in ecstasy, listening to Your Praises with my ears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਦਾਸਾ ਘਰਿ ਘਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam nidhaan daasaa ghar ghanaa |
lines.english: The great ambrosial treasure, the Nectar of the Naam, is in the home of the Lord's slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਮਾਵਾ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਕਾਰ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਪਵਿਤੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kamaavaa tin kee kaar sareer pavit hoe |
lines.english: Serving them, my body is purified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਹੁ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: aapahu kachhoo na hoe prabh nadar nihaaleeai |
lines.english: By myself, I can do nothing; O God, bless me with Your Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਖਾ ਪਾਣੀ ਪੀਸਿ ਬਿਗਸਾ ਪੈਰ ਧੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: pakhaa paanee pees bigasaa pair dhoe |
lines.english: I wave the fans over them, and carry water for them; I grind the corn for them, and washing their feet, I am over-joyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਦਿਚੈ ਥਾਉ ਸੰਤ ਧਰਮ ਸਾਲੀਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mohi niragun dichai thaau sant dharam saaleeai |3|
lines.english: I am worthless - please, bless me with a seat in the place of worship of the Saints. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨ ਤੇਰੇ ਚਰਨ ਕੀ ਹੋਇ ਰਹਾ ਸਦ ਧੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saajan tere charan kee hoe rahaa sad dhoor |
lines.english: O Friend, I pray that I may remain forever the dust of Your Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਅਸੰਖ ਹੋਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਗ ॥
lines.translit: patit puneet asankh hohi har charanee man laag |
lines.english: Countless sinners become pure, by fixing their minds on the Feet of the Lord.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਤੁਹਾਰੀਆ ਪੇਖਉ ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak saran tuhaareea pekhau sadaa hajoor |1|
lines.english: Nanak has entered Your Sanctuary, and beholds You ever-present. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਜਪੀਐ ਸਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਸਿ ਨਾਉ ਪਰਵਦਿਗਾਰ ਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: nit japeeai saas giraas naau paravadigaar daa |
lines.english: With every breath and morsel of food, chant the Name of the Lord, the Cherisher.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: atthasatth teerath naam prabh jis naanak masatak bhaag |2|
lines.english: The Name of God is the sixty-eight holy places of pilgrimage, O Nanak, for one who has such destiny written upon his forehead. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਵਣਹਾਰ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਮਾਰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: aap upaavanahaar aape hee maaradaa |
lines.english: He Himself is the Creator, and He Himself destroys.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਰੇ ਰਹੰਮ ਤਿਸੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਾਰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis no kare raham tis na visaaradaa |
lines.english: The Lord does not forget one upon whom He has bestowed His Grace.
